dates.summary: OpenAI introduced a new $100/month ChatGPT Pro tier, creating a mid-market price point between Plus at $20 and the existing $200 plan while offering 5x more Codex usage for heavier coding workflows. ByteDance Seed simultaneously surfaced multiple model artifacts — Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM — signaling continued competition in multimodal and speech-native systems. On the research side, the DMax paper proposed a new decoding method for diffusion language models aimed at much higher parallelism without the usual quality collapse, a potentially important efficiency lever if results hold up.
